name: 🚀 System Activation
text: Hello! The WhatsApp Bridge Service v3.0.0 has been successfully initialized. All systems are operational and secure.

name: 🔐 Security Protocol
text: SECURITY ALERT: A new administrative login has been recorded for this bridge instance. If this was not you, please audit your session immediately.

name: 🔍 Heartbeat Sync
text: V3 DIAGNOSTIC: Heartbeat puls received. Signal strength optimal. Connectivity confirmed.

name: 📢 Global Broadcast
text: ATTENTION: This is a system-wide broadcast notification sent via the Bridge Command Center directory.

name: ⏱️ Maintenance Alert
text: SCHEDULED MAINTENANCE: The bridge will undergo a brief software optimization in 15 minutes. Connectivity may pulse momentarily.
